creator: matteo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #4)

Hi Philip,

I agree. I'm still very puzzled by the sig-notation: who is " issuer-fpr@notations.openpgp.fifthhorseman.net"? Is one supposed to use one's own address there?". Why do you think it is useful?

I can update patch to just remove any option, or you can just go ahead and remove this part.
